submissions.title: Submissions
submissions.description: Educational student and volunteer applications for FutureCore

projectName.description: Name of the target class or volunteering role

fullName.description: FIO of the parent or volunteer practitioner

phone.description: Primary voice or WhatsApp contact link

motivation.description: Personal notes, goals, or social background details

availability.description: Weekday or weekend availability slots list

documents.description: Uploaded credential details or document items list

googleFormsUrl.description: Optional fallback doc link for forms integration

volunteerAge.description: Age bracket for activists above 14 years old

childInfo.description: Name and age details of the registered child

/submissions/{id}.description: Durable collection containing enrolled students and volunteer applications
